programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Wacky hijinks of counselors and campers at a less-than-average summer camp

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A fake mind reader recognizes Dr Kimble To bolster TV ratings for his act he provides the police with clues designed to show his psychic prowess

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: An inventor dies while testing a new underwater detection device

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike tells an inept skin-diving pupil that theres no point in continuing his lessons

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Savage is badly injured when his plane crashes near an ancestral mansion in the flight path of the base and later fights with its beautiful female owner to have it legally demolished

programme.title: House Of Dark Shadows
programme.desc: House Of Dark Shadows

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A ventriloquists dummy becomes a vessel for evil when it comes to life and demands that its master commit murder

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is upset to learn that Little Luke wants to grow up to be a scientist rather than continuing farming in the MCcoy tradition

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Grampa and his best friend George have their caps set on the new librarian

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max enters the world of art looking for an art thief know as Bronzefinger

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is using parrots to learn secret formulas and then KAOS smuggles them out of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans 312
programme.desc: Hogans 312

programme.title: Hogans 317
programme.desc: Hogans 317

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing
programme.desc: An American President stumbles upon a secret world-threatening crisis

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Vorjak and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons Augur is on the run from volunteers but sends a friend Juliet to help Liam while hes gone

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to disorganise human society by paralysing its means of communication

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: When a ship carrying a prisoner lands at Moonbase Alpha after asking for assistance Maya insists that the prisoner is a poet and not a murderer and releases him

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Army scout Cheyenne is court-martialed for cowardice when he wants to abandon Army horses the Army needs to raiders who always know where to strike The post commander is frustrated as is his wife who wants to return back east

programme.title: Young 219
programme.desc: Young 219

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A boyish Pied Piper leads teenaged girls into prostitution His gentle manner makes his girls willing victims- and hides the fact that he has also committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps Co continue their plan to smash the renegade slavery operation of the absolute ruler of a Middle Eastern nation Phelps posing as a slave trader works his way into the confidence of the ruler In that role Phelps sells Cinnamon into slavery Meanwhile the rest of the IMF team is preparing to pull a switch that will force the rulers brother to confront the situation and force the end of slavery in his nation

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble spots the murderer of his wife in Chicago but is unaware that the newspaper man helping him is under pressure by his editor to turn Kimble into the police if they fail to catch him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When an old law school friend of Jarrod comes to visit a following Secret Service agent tells Jarrod that he is suspects his friend is a counterfeiter

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne on an Army task is chased by the Sioux He wounds a miner so he stays to help the miner and his wife Three men wanted for selling faulty guns to the Sioux arrive with eyes for the wife and the gold although the Sioux threaten

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When the planets are in line with each other in this particular galaxy it creates a temporary portal out of this universe into a universe of opposites where the evil halves of personalities live Saw Boss tries to trick Jayce into it

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation
